title: minuartia tenuifolia subsp. mediterranea
intro: Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. mediterranea is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family, characterized by its small, pink to white flowers and delicate foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Minuartia tenuifolia subsp. mediterranea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
